# Run State

## Task

- task_id:
- title:
- workspace:
- change_package:
- execution_mode: `heartbeat`
- engine: `method-forge-execute`

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| status | `running` / `blocked` / `waiting-human` / `waiting-external` / `completed` / `aborted` |
| current_step | |
| last_success_step | |
| next_action | |
| stop_reason | |

| --- | --- |
| retry_count | `0` |
| same_error_repeat_count | `0` |
| no_progress_cycle_count | `0` |
| total_cycle_count | `0` |
| last_error_signature | |
